title: LATERN 15Pcs Christmas Wind Up Toys, 5CM x 7CM Christmas Clockwork Toys Mini Santa Claus Snowman Penguins Jumping Walking Toy for Kids Adults Christma Stocking Stuffers Party Bag Filler
features: [High quality] Made of high-quality plastic, non-toxic and odorless, safe and durable, will not rust or fade, not easy to break, can be used for a long time, smooth surface and no sharp parts, bright colors

[15 Christmas styles] Inlcuded 15 unique and different character designs, such as: Santa Claus, Snowman, Penguin and Christmas Tree etc popular holiday characters, creating a Christmas atmosphere for party

[Easy to use] Simply twist the clockwork a few times, and release to watch these wind up toys perform lively actions like: walking, shaking heads, or crawling; All without batteries or electricity, easy to enjoy the fun

[Size] Height: 4.3cm - 7.8cm, width: 4.5cm - 5.8cm, suitable size for children to grasp and play; Interactive design encourages parents and teachers to participate in fun games with children, will enhancing relationship

[Applicable] Each toy is uniquely designed to ensure no duplication, perfect as a Christmas stocking stuffer or party favor, can also be used in gift bags filler, school rewards, birthday activities or carnival prizes
description: Product Description LATERN 15Pcs 5CM x 7CM Christmas Wind Up Toys
